---
title: ""
page-layout: full
engine: markdown
---

::: page-header
# Publications {#publications}
:::

::: jump-nav
[Publications](#publications){.jump-link} [Peer review](#peer-review){.jump-link}
:::

------------------------------------------------------------------------

```{=html}
<style>
.pub-layout {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 160px;
  gap: 2.5rem;
  align-items: start;
}
.pub-main { min-width: 0; }
.pub-sidebar {
  position: sticky;
  top: 80px;
}
.sidebar-section {
  background: var(--bg-card);
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: var(--radius);
  padding: 1.1rem;
  box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm);
}
.sidebar-label {
  font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif;
  font-size: 0.68rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: 0.07em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--text-muted);
  display: block;
  margin-bottom: 0.6rem;
}
.sidebar-links {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 0.35rem;
}
.sidebar-link {
  font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif;
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: var(--navy) !important;
  text-decoration: none !important;
  padding: 0.3rem 0.5rem;
  border-radius: 6px;
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  transition: background 0.15s, border-color 0.15s, transform 0.15s;
  display: block;
  text-align: center;
}
.sidebar-link:hover {
  background: var(--tag-bg);
  border-color: var(--navy);
  transform: translateY(-1px);
}
.pub-year-head {
  font-size: 0.75rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: 0.08em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--accent);
  margin: 2rem 0 0.75rem 0;
  padding-bottom: 0.4rem;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
}
.pub-entry-block {
  display: flex;
  align-items: flex-start;
  gap: 0.75rem;
  padding: 0.85rem 0;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
}
.pub-entry-block:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
.pub-favicon-wrap, .pub-favicon-fallback {
  flex-shrink: 0;
  width: 28px;
  height: 28px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  border-radius: 6px;
  background: var(--tag-bg);
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
}
.pub-favicon-wrap img { width: 16px; height: 16px; display: block; }
.pub-entry-text { flex: 1; min-width: 0; }
.pub-title-link {
  font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif;
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: var(--navy) !important;
  text-decoration: none !important;
  line-height: 1.4;
}
.pub-title-link:hover { text-decoration: underline !important; }
.pub-actions {
  display: flex;
  gap: 0.4rem;
  margin-top: 0.45rem;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
}
.pub-btn {
  font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif;
  font-size: 0.72rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: var(--navy) !important;
  text-decoration: none !important;
  padding: 0.18rem 0.6rem;
  border-radius: 999px;
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  background: transparent;
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: background 0.15s, border-color 0.15s;
  white-space: nowrap;
}
.pub-btn:hover { background: var(--tag-bg); border-color: var(--navy); }
.pub-section-heading {
  font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif;
  font-size: 1.55rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: var(--navy);
  letter-spacing: -0.02em;
  margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
}
.pub-synced-note {
  font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif;
  font-size: 0.72rem;
  color: var(--text-muted);
  letter-spacing: 0.02em;
}
.pub-synced-note a { color: var(--text-muted); text-decoration: underline; }
.pub-scholar-link {
  font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif;
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: var(--navy) !important;
  text-decoration: none !important;
  padding: 0.3rem 0.85rem;
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: 999px;
  transition: background 0.18s, border-color 0.18s;
}
.pub-scholar-link:hover { background: var(--tag-bg); border-color: var(--navy); }
.peer-review-section {
  margin-top: 2rem;
  padding-top: 1.5rem;
  border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
}
.peer-review-section h2 {
  font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif;
  font-size: 1.55rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: var(--navy);
  letter-spacing: -0.02em;
  margin-bottom: 0.75rem;
}
.peer-review-section p {
  font-size: 1rem;
  color: #2a2a2a;
  line-height: 1.75;
}
.pub-loading {
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  color: var(--text-muted);
}
@media (max-width: 860px) {
  .pub-layout { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
  .pub-sidebar { display: none; }
}
</style>

<div class="pub-layout">

  <div class="pub-main">
    <h2 id="publications" class="pub-section-heading">Publications</h2>
    <div id="orcid-pubs">
      <p class="pub-loading">Loading publications from ORCID…</p>
    </div>

    <div class="peer-review-section">
      <h2 id="peer-review">Peer review</h2>
      <p>I contribute to peer review for journals in psychology, behavioural science, and digital health. Recent reviews include work for <em>Behaviour &amp; Information Technology</em> and <em>Scientific Reports</em>.</p>

  <div class="pub-sidebar">
    <div class="sidebar-section">
      <span class="sidebar-label">Find me online</span>
      <div class="sidebar-links">
        <a href="https://orcid.org/0009-0000-1020-2333" class="sidebar-link" target="_blank">ORCID</a>
        <a href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=ZEvUL_kAAAAJ&hl=en" class="sidebar-link" target="_blank">Google Scholar</a>
        <a href="https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Connor-Conkey-Morrison" class="sidebar-link" target="_blank">ResearchGate</a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>

<script>
const ORCID_ID   = '0009-0000-1020-2333';
const SCHOLAR_URL = 'https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=ZEvUL_kAAAAJ&hl=en';
const MAX_PUBS   = 6;

async function fetchFullWork(putCode, doi) {
  try {
    const res = await fetch(`https://pub.orcid.org/v3.0/${ORCID_ID}/work/${putCode}`, { headers: { Accept: 'application/json' } });
    if (!res.ok) return null;
    const data = await res.json();
    const contributors = data['bulk']?.[0]?.work?.contributors?.contributor || data.contributors?.contributor || [];
    const authors = contributors.filter(c => (c['contributor-attributes']?.['contributor-role'] || '').toLowerCase() === 'author').map(c => {
      const cn = c['credit-name']?.value || '';
      const parts = cn.split(/\s+/);
      const last = parts.pop() || '';
      const init = parts[0] ? parts[0][0] + '.' : '';
      return `${last}, ${init}`.trim().replace(/,$/, '');
    }).filter(Boolean);
    const volume = data.volume?.value || null;
    const issue  = data['journal-issue']?.['issue-number']?.value || null;
    const pages  = data.pages?.start?.value ? (data.pages.end?.value ? `${data.pages.start.value}–${data.pages.end.value}` : data.pages.start.value) : null;
    let journalUrl = doi ? `https://doi.org/${doi}` : null;
    try {
      if (doi) {
        const cr = await fetch(`https://api.crossref.org/works/${encodeURIComponent(doi)}?mailto=connorconkeymorrison@gmail.com`);
        if (cr.ok) {
          const cd = await cr.json();
          const issn = cd.message?.ISSN?.[0];
          if (issn) journalUrl = `https://www.crossref.org/openurl?issn=${issn}&genre=journal`;
          const link = cd.message?.URL || cd.message?.resource?.primary?.URL;
          if (link) journalUrl = link;
        }
      }
    } catch {}
    return { authors, volume, issue, pages, journalUrl };
  } catch { return null; }
}

function buildAPA(w) {
  const authors = w.authors?.length ? w.authors.join(', ') : 'Unknown author';
  const year = w.year || 'n.d.';
  const title = w.title || 'Untitled';
  const journal = w.journal ? `<em>${w.journal}</em>` : '';
  const vol = w.volume ? `<em>${w.volume}</em>` : '';
  const issue = w.issue ? `(${w.issue})` : '';
  const pages = w.pages || '';
  const doi = w.doi ? `https://doi.org/${w.doi}` : '';
  let citation = `${authors} (${year}). ${title}.`;
  if (journal) { citation += ` ${journal}`; if (vol) citation += `, ${vol}${issue}`; if (pages) citation += `, ${pages}`; }
  if (doi) citation += `. ${doi}`;
  return citation;
}

function buildRIS(w) {
  const lines = ['TY  - JOUR'];
  (w.authors || []).forEach(a => lines.push(`AU  - ${a}`));
  lines.push(`TI  - ${w.title || ''}`);
  if (w.journal) lines.push(`JO  - ${w.journal}`);
  if (w.year) lines.push(`PY  - ${w.year}`);
  if (w.volume) lines.push(`VL  - ${w.volume}`);
  if (w.issue) lines.push(`IS  - ${w.issue}`);
  if (w.pages) { const [s, e] = w.pages.split('–'); lines.push(`SP  - ${s || ''}`); if (e) lines.push(`EP  - ${e}`); }
  if (w.doi) lines.push(`DO  - ${w.doi}`);
  lines.push('ER  - ');
  return lines.join('\n');
}

function renderWorks(works, showSynced) {
  const byYear = {};
  works.forEach(w => { const y = w.year || 'n.d.'; if (!byYear[y]) byYear[y] = []; byYear[y].push(w); });
  const years = Object.keys(byYear).sort((a, b) => b - a);
  let html = '';
  years.forEach(y => {
    html += `<div class="pub-year-head">${y}</div>`;
    byYear[y].forEach(w => {
      const faviconHtml = w.journalUrl
        ? `<div class="pub-favicon-wrap"><img src="https://www.google.com/s2/favicons?sz=32&domain_url=${encodeURIComponent(w.journalUrl)}" alt="" onerror="this.parentElement.outerHTML='<div class=pub-favicon-fallback><svg xmlns=http://www.w3.org/2000/svg width=16 height=16 viewBox=0 0 24 24 fill=none stroke=currentColor stroke-width=1.75><path d=M12 2L2 7l10 5 10-5-10-5M2 17l10 5 10-5M2 12l10 5 10-5/></svg></div>'"></div>`
        : `<div class="pub-favicon-fallback"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.75"><path d="M12 2L2 7l10 5 10-5-10-5M2 17l10 5 10-5M2 12l10 5 10-5"/></svg></div>`;
      const journalLink = w.journalUrl
        ? `<a href="${w.journalUrl}" target="_blank" style="font-size:0.82rem;color:var(--text-muted);font-style:italic;text-decoration:underline;">${w.journal || 'View journal'}</a>`
        : (w.journal ? `<span style="font-size:0.82rem;color:var(--text-muted);font-style:italic;">${w.journal}</span>` : '');
      const authorsLine = w.authors?.length ? `<div style="font-size:0.82rem;color:var(--text-muted);margin-top:0.15rem;">${w.authors.join(', ')}</div>` : '';
      const doiLink = w.doi ? `<a href="https://doi.org/${w.doi}" target="_blank" class="pub-btn">DOI ↗</a>` : '';
      const apaBtnId = `apa-${w.putCode}`;
      const risBtnId = `ris-${w.putCode}`;
      html += `<div class="pub-entry-block">
        ${faviconHtml}
        <div class="pub-entry-text">
          <a href="${w.doi ? 'https://doi.org/' + w.doi : '#'}" target="_blank" class="pub-title-link">${w.title}</a>
          ${authorsLine}
          ${journalLink ? `<div style="margin-top:0.15rem;">${journalLink}</div>` : ''}
          <div class="pub-actions">
            ${doiLink}
            <button class="pub-btn" id="${apaBtnId}" onclick="copyAPA(${JSON.stringify(w).replace(/"/g, '&quot;')}, '${apaBtnId}')">Copy APA 7</button>
            <button class="pub-btn" id="${risBtnId}" onclick="downloadRIS(${JSON.stringify(w).replace(/"/g, '&quot;')}, '${risBtnId}')">Download RIS</button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>`;
    });
  });
  const footer = document.createElement('div');
  footer.style.cssText = 'margin-top:1.5rem;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:0.75rem;';
  if (showSynced) {
    footer.innerHTML = `<span class="pub-synced-note">Synced from <a href="https://orcid.org/${ORCID_ID}" target="_blank">ORCID</a></span><a href="${SCHOLAR_URL}" target="_blank" class="pub-scholar-link">View all on Google Scholar →</a>`;
  }
  return { html, footer };
}

function copyAPA(w, btnId) {
  const text = buildAPA(w).replace(/<[^>]+>/g, '');
  navigator.clipboard.writeText(text).then(() => {
    const btn = document.getElementById(btnId);
    if (btn) { btn.textContent = 'Copied!'; setTimeout(() => { btn.textContent = 'Copy APA 7'; }, 1800); }
  });
}

function downloadRIS(w, btnId) {
  const content = buildRIS(w);
  const blob = new Blob([content], { type: 'application/x-research-info-systems' });
  const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
  const a = document.createElement('a');
  a.href = url; a.download = `${(w.title || 'reference').slice(0, 40).replace(/[^a-z0-9]/gi, '_')}.ris`;
  document.body.appendChild(a); a.click();
  document.body.removeChild(a); URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
  const btn = document.getElementById(btnId);
  if (btn) { btn.textContent = 'Downloading…'; setTimeout(() => { btn.textContent = 'Download RIS'; }, 1800); }
}

async function loadOrcidPublications() {
  const container = document.getElementById('orcid-pubs');
  try {
    const res = await fetch(`https://pub.orcid.org/v3.0/${ORCID_ID}/works`, { headers: { Accept: 'application/json' } });
    if (!res.ok) throw new Error('ORCID fetch failed');
    const data = await res.json();
    const groups = data.group || [];
    const summaries = [];
    for (const g of groups) {
      const summary = g['work-summary']?.[0];
      if (!summary) continue;
      const title = summary.title?.title?.value || 'Untitled';
      const year  = parseInt(summary['publication-date']?.year?.value) || 0;
      const journal = summary['journal-title']?.value || '';
      let doi = null;
      for (const eid of summary['external-ids']?.['external-id'] || []) { if (eid['external-id-type'] === 'doi') { doi = eid['external-id-value']; break; } }
      summaries.push({ title, year, journal, doi, putCode: summary['put-code'] });
    }
    if (summaries.length === 0) throw new Error('empty');
    summaries.sort((a, b) => b.year - a.year);
    const top = summaries.slice(0, MAX_PUBS);
    const fullRecords = await Promise.all(top.map(s => fetchFullWork(s.putCode, s.doi)));
    const works = top.map((s, i) => ({ ...s, authors: fullRecords[i]?.authors || null, volume: fullRecords[i]?.volume || null, issue: fullRecords[i]?.issue || null, pages: fullRecords[i]?.pages || null, journalUrl: fullRecords[i]?.journalUrl || (s.doi ? `https://doi.org/${s.doi}` : null) }));
    const { html, footer } = renderWorks(works, true);
    container.innerHTML = html;
    container.appendChild(footer);
  } catch {
    container.innerHTML = '<p class="pub-loading">Could not load publications. <a href="https://orcid.org/0009-0000-1020-2333" target="_blank">View on ORCID →</a></p>';
  }
}

loadOrcidPublications();
</script>
```
